message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #ffffcc
  BorderColor #cccc99
}

title IPv4 Packet Transmission Sequence Diagram

actor "Upper layer" as upper
database "tuple" as tuple_db
package "IP Layer" {
  component "IPv4 layer" as ipv4_layer
  database "Routing table" as routing_table
}
package "IPv4 Ineterface" {
  component "IPv4 interface" as ipv4_interface
  database "ARP" as arp_db
}
actor "Lower layer" as lower

upper -> ipv4_layer : IPdata
activate ipv4_layer
note right of ipv4_layer: Allocate\nIPv4 header

ipv4_layer -> routing_table : dst=192.0.2.1
activate routing_table
routing_table --> ipv4_layer
deactivate routing_table

note left of ipv4_layer: IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1

ipv4_layer --> upper
note left of upper: IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1

ipv4_layer -> ipv4_interface
activate ipv4_interface
ipv4_interface --> ipv4_layer
note left of ipv4_layer: IPv4.src=198.51.100.2

ipv4_interface -> arp_db : gw=198.51.100.1
activate arp_db
arp_db --> ipv4_interface : mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01
deactivate arp_db

ipv4_interface --> upper
note left of upper: Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01

ipv4_interface -> lower
deactivate ipv4_interface
deactivate ipv4_layer

@enduml
```
